findings.message: X has evidence for 133 companies, with 128 still scoring after stricter attribution guards.
Instagram remains sparse; only verified HeyClicky evidence is currently scored.
Product Hunt has no scored evidence; needs reviewed verified launch URLs.
Instagram doctor still needs explicit reusable session config for browser probe.
